query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_gates,
  SUM(CASE WHEN digestSafe = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS digest_safe_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN digestSafe = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_digest_safe
FROM projectValidationGates;

  SUM(CASE WHEN digestSafe = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_digest_safe
